meta.title: KTV-Picker | Never run out of songs again
meta.description: Import QQ Music playlists or paste song text, then pick the perfect KTV queue with friends.

landing.title: Bring the playlist. We will find the next song.
landing.subtitle: Paste a QQ Music share URL or a messy song list. KTV-Picker normalizes every track for fast swipe picking and room sync.
landing.textPlaceholder:
Blue and White Porcelain - Jay Chou
Later - Rene Liu
landing.emptyHint: Paste a URL or at least one song line to begin.
landing.nextAfterImport: Next: review the preview list. Swipe picking and room sync are the next build step.
